title: gypsophila fruticulosa
intro: Gypsophila fruticulosa, also known as shrubby gypsophila, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gypsophila fruticulosa include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
